name: Minidinos
short_description: In this fun, family-friendly real-time strategy game, kids can control dinosaurs, beasts, and bugs as they battle for supremacy! Build your army, gather resources, and outsmart your enemies in epic showdowns. Play solo against the computer or team up with friends for multiplayer action!
detailed_description:
Fun, kid-friendly real-time strategy game!

Control an army of dinosaurs, powerful beasts or buzzing bugs as they face off in colorful, action-packed battles.

Perfect for kids, this game combines strategy and creativity in a safe, entertaining environment!

Build your base, gather resources, and lead your creatures to victory in a vibrant world full of surprises.

Designed for young players, the game features simple mechanics, exciting challenges, and a friendly learning curve. You can even turn on an AI assistant to occasionally make a helpful move if you get stuck.

Experienced players can use advanced features or face off more skilled AI opponents.

Play solo against the AI in thrilling missions or team up with friends for multiplayer fun - up to 4 players can play at the same time on the same computer thanks to a unique set of simple controls.
